sub_pixel_system.notes: Uses modified Doom engine; no sub-pixel precision documented

special_mechanics.name: Flight
special_mechanics.description: Player can fly; documented as a feature added to improved Doom engine version

special_mechanics.name: Environmental Push Forces
special_mechanics.description: Interactive environments such as rushing water that pushes the player character along

special_mechanics.name: Look Up/Down
special_mechanics.description: Ability to look up and down within constraints using proportional pixel-shearing effect rather than true 3D rendering

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Heretic uses a modified Doom engine and no specific movement physics parameters are documented in available sources. All numerical physics values remain unknown.
